acceptance_criteria: cargo check/test/clippy green; new handoff in thoughts/shared/handoffs/general; jj describe.
description: Reverify Phase 3 derive(Signature); run cargo check/test/clippy and write handoff.
title: Phase 3 reverification

description: [DSRs: crates/baml-bridge/src/py.rs + crates/dspy-rs/src/py.rs] Add pyo3 feature to baml-bridge. Create baml_value_to_py(), py_to_baml_value() (schema-guided), normalize_python_object(). Create dspy-rs/src/py.rs with missing_output_fields<S>, kwargs_to_baml_value<S>, collect_checks_for_output<S>.

notes.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local
notes.content:
Plan (Task 2.4): add feature‑gated Python conversion helpers in baml-bridge + dspy-rs.
- `crates/baml-bridge/Cargo.toml`: feature `pyo3 = [dep:pyo3]`.
- `crates/baml-bridge/src/py.rs`: `baml_value_to_py`, `py_to_baml_value` (schema-guided), normalization helpers + optional orjson fallback.
- `crates/dspy-rs/src/py.rs`: Signature-aware helpers (`kwargs_to_baml_value`, `missing_output_fields`, `collect_checks_for_output`).
- `crates/dspy-rs/Cargo.toml` feature `rlm = [rlm-core, rlm-derive, pyo3, baml-bridge/pyo3]` and optional re-export in `lib.rs`.

title: Task 2.4: Add Python conversion helpers in baml-bridge (feature-gated)
